ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "registrar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registrar managing the domain */,
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the TLD of the domain */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was created */,
  "expire_date" TEXT /* Date the domain will expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the domain (e.g., Active, Expired, Suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the domain */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the domain (e.g., registrant name, email) */,
  "dns_servers" TEXT /* DNS servers associated with the domain */,
  "whois_privacy" INTEGER /* Indicates if Whois privacy is enabled for the domain */,
  "more_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the domain (e.g., DNS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_tld_id FOREIGN KEY ("tld_id") REFERENCES top_level_domains ("tld_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_registrar_id FOREIGN KEY ("registrar_id") REFERENCES registrars ("registrar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrars" (
  "registrar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registrar */,
  "registrar_name" TEXT /* Name of the registrar */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the registrar */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the registrar */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the registrar */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the registrar */,
  "support_phone" TEXT /* Support phone number for the registrar */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Support email address for the registrar */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the registrar */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the registrar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registrar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_level_domains" (
  "tld_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TLD */,
  "tld_name" TEXT /* Name of the TLD (e.g., .com, .net) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the TLD */,
  "registration_fee" TEXT /* Registration fee for the TLD */,
  "renewal_fee" TEXT /* Renewal fee for the TLD */,
  "validity_period" INTEGER /* Validity period (in years) for the TLD */,
  "registrar_eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for registrars to manage the TLD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tld_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domain_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "registrar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the registrar managing the domains */,
  "domains_managed" INTEGER /* Number of domains managed by the registrar */,
  "registrations" INTEGER /* Number of domain registrations */,
  "expirations" INTEGER /* Number of domain expirations */,
  "total_renewals" INTEGER /* Total number of domain renewals */,
  "total_transfers" INTEGER /* Total number of domain transfers */,
  "average_registration_duration" INTEGER /* Average registration duration (in days) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domain_statistics_registrar_id FOREIGN KEY ("registrar_id") REFERENCES registrars ("registrar_id")
)
